news.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
news.summary: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

news.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
news.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

news.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
news.summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

news.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
news.summary: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

news.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
news.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

news.title: Valve just imported 13 tons of VR headsets in one day
news.summary: On June 10th, the German container ship Posen docked in Los Angeles after a two-week voyage from Shanghai. news.title: Nothing CEO says phone prices are going to keep going up
news.summary: If you're thinking about upgrading your phone, "the best time was yesterday," according to Nothing CEO and co-founder Carl Pei, echoing a message we heard during MWC. news.title: The world’s first trillionaire is a killer
news.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO will probably make him the richest person to ever walk the planet. news.summary: Elon Musk is now officially the world's first trillionaire. That is a colossal amount of wealth (and by proxy, power) for one individual to have. news.title: Anthropic shuts down Fable, Mythos models following Trump admin directive
news.summary: Commerce dept. worries that a Fable 5 "jailbreak" could be a national security threat.

news.title: SpaceX is now a public company valued for its AI potential, so what comes next?
news.summary: As of today, SpaceX is owned by investors who will want to see it make money.

news.title: PeopleSoft 0-day affecting hundreds of organizations steals gigabytes of data
news.summary: Vulnerability in the Oracle-owned PeopleSoft software is about as critical as they come.

news.title: Controversial FISA spying law expires tonight. The spying will continue.
news.summary: Section 702 of FISA to expire tonight, but certification lasts until March 2027.

news.title: Here's what Jeff Bezos' new startup Prometheus will do
news.summary: It isn't the only startup tackling physical AI, but it's one of the best-funded.

news.title: Here’s How AI Agents Can Protect EV Chargers
news.summary: An AI agent system proposed by researchers in Spain promises to prevent energy theft and damage to EV chargers, as well as the critical energy infrastructure that powers them.

news.title: Anthropic Says It’s Taking Claude Fable 5 Offline to Comply With US Government Order
news.summary: “The government believes it has become aware of a method of bypassing, or ‘jailbreaking’ Fable 5,” the company said in a blog post.

news.title: Meta Employees Absolutely Hate Mark Zuckerberg’s Plan for a Companywide AI Hackathon
news.summary: “I’m not sure that this company supports a hackathon culture anymore,” one employee posted in a forum open to the entire staff.

news.title: ‘Tell Him He’s a Piece of Shit’: Meta’s New AI Unit Is a Total Mess
news.summary: Executives and employees alike are struggling with Meta’s chaotic AI strategy, according to sources and internal discussions reviewed by WIRED.

news.title: Donald Trump’s White House UFC Event Would Be Embarrassing Anywhere
news.summary: A Monster Energy–sponsored MMA show on the White House’s South Lawn was never going to be the height of dignity. But UFC Freedom 250 is failing to clear even the lowest bar.
